queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk drivers and its correlation with reduced default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with minimal savings account balances and their role in mitigating credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how medium-term employment duration between four and seven years influences credit risk drivers and lowers default likelihood.
